title: STARLIGHT Protocol
description: Temporal traversal-based symbolic encoding protocol featuring weekday-dependent 7x7 grid transformations, positional cyclic shifts, and traversal-based word reordering with an interactive visualizer and full protocol trace.

title: GhostFile
description: Client-side privacy and metadata analysis tool that inspects files locally in the browser. It analyzes metadata, embedded signals, and privacy-related file information without uploading data to a server.

title: ClusterSage
description: AI-powered Kubernetes diagnosis and resilience testing for local clusters. It bootstraps demo namespaces, injects controlled failures, and produces explainable LLM-assisted analysis with pod status, logs, and synthetic metrics.

title: FusionForge
description: Multi-model AI answer aggregation platform with React and Node.js that compares, ranks, and synthesizes outputs from multiple language models.

title: Jothe
description: Privacy-first offline Android productivity app built around one task at a time. It understands routine signals like sleep and busy hours, prioritizes what matters next, adapts to user actions (start, delay, done), and reduces decision friction with a minimal, distraction-free flow.

title: All-in-One Smart Alert Box
description: IoT safety device built with ESP8266 capable of sending mobile and email alerts using real-time sensor monitoring.
